data.title: Correa Group Achieves Record Financial Results and Plans Expansion
data.description:
The latest update is out from Nicolas Correa ( (ES:NEA) ).

The Correa Group reported historic financial results for 2024, with a turnover of 121 million euros and a profit before taxes of 17 million euros, marking an 11% growth in turnover and a 34% increase in profit. The company plans to propose a record dividend and has made significant investments to expand and modernize its production facilities, positioning itself as a leader in profitability within the European market. Despite nearing full production capacity, the company remains focused on innovation and modernization to support sustainable growth, while addressing challenges posed by the current geopolitical climate.

More about Nicolas Correa

The Correa Group is a leading global manufacturer of large milling machines and industrial components for the machine tool sector. Founded in 1947, Nicolás Correa S.A. is the parent company and is listed on the Madrid Stock Exchange. The company exports around 90% of its production to over 20 countries, supported by a network of distributors and subsidiaries.

YTD Price Performance: 18.44%

Average Trading Volume: 205

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €109.8M

data.title: British Land Updates Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
The latest update is out from British Land Company plc ( (GB:BLND) ).

British Land Company plc has announced its updated share capital structure as of February 28, 2025. The company has a total of 999,154,259 shares with voting rights, following the retention of 11,266,245 shares in Treasury. This information is crucial for shareholders and stakeholders to determine their voting rights percentages and comply with the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

More about British Land Company plc

British Land Company plc operates in the real estate industry, focusing on the development and management of commercial properties. The company primarily deals with office spaces, retail locations, and mixed-use developments, catering to a diverse range of businesses and consumers.

data.title: Traws Pharma Regains Nasdaq Compliance with $20M Financing
data.description:
Traws Pharma ( (TRAW) ) has shared an announcement.

Traws Pharma announced on February 28, 2025, that it has regained compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum stockholders’ equity requirement, ensuring continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. This follows a successful hearing and a $20 million financing, positioning Traws to advance its antiviral programs, particularly for bird flu and influenza, while being subject to a one-year monitoring period to maintain compliance.

More about Traws Pharma

Traws Pharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing oral small molecule therapies for respiratory viral diseases. Their pipeline includes drug candidates for bird/pandemic flu and COVID-19, with a commitment to addressing unmet medical needs through advanced drug development technology.

data.title: Rare Foods Australia Reports Revenue Decline but Improved Operational Efficiency
data.description:
Rare Foods Australia Limited ( (AU:RFA) ) just unveiled an update.

Rare Foods Australia Limited reported a 37% decrease in revenue from ordinary activities for the half-year ending December 31, 2024, compared to the previous year. Despite the revenue decline, the company saw an increase in EBITDA and EBIT, indicating improved operational efficiency. The company did not propose any dividends for the period, reflecting a cautious financial strategy amid challenging market conditions.

More about Rare Foods Australia Limited

Rare Foods Australia Limited operates in the seafood industry, focusing on the production and distribution of abalone products. The company is based in Australia and oversees several controlled entities involved in abalone operations.

data.title: Ever Glory United Holdings Limited Announces Change in Company Secretaries
data.description:
An update from Ever Glory United Holdings Limited ( (SG:ZKX) ) is now available.

Ever Glory United Holdings Limited announced a change in its company secretaries, appointing Ms. Shirley Tan Sey Liy effective March 1, 2025, replacing Ms. Kong Wei Fung and Ms. Cheok Hui Yee. The board expressed gratitude to the outgoing secretaries for their service. This leadership change is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its corporate governance as it continues to establish its presence on the Singapore Exchange.

More about Ever Glory United Holdings Limited

Ever Glory United Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore and listed on the Catalist of the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited. The company went public on May 18, 2023, with its initial public offering sponsored by Novus Corporate Finance Pte. Ltd.

data.title: Sinopec Shanghai Petrochemical Holds Successful 2025 EGM
data.description:
Sinopec Shanghai Petrochemical Co ( (HK:0338) ) has shared an announcement.

Sinopec Shanghai Petrochemical Company Limited held its 2025 First Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on February 28, 2025, at the North Building of Jinshan Hotel, Shanghai. The meeting was attended by 667 shareholders and proxies, representing 55.54% of the company’s shares with voting rights. All proposed resolutions were passed without objections. The meeting was conducted in compliance with relevant Chinese regulations, and the company’s board and supervisory members were present, except for a few who were absent due to business engagements.

More about Sinopec Shanghai Petrochemical Co

Sinopec Shanghai Petrochemical Company Limited is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. It operates in the petrochemical industry, focusing on the production and distribution of petrochemical products.

data.title: Super Copper Corp. Closes First Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
Super Copper Corp. ( (TSE:CUPR) ) has provided an update.

Super Copper Corp. has successfully closed the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising $175,000 through the issuance of 437,500 units. The proceeds will be used for marketing, investor relations, working capital, and general corporate purposes, potentially enhancing the company’s operational capabilities and market presence.

More about Super Copper Corp.

Super Copper Corp. is a mining exploration company with a Material Science and Technology Division focused on developing innovative chemical solutions to improve metal recovery processes and reduce chemical waste in the mining industry. The company is advancing its flagship copper project in Atacama, Chile, a region known for its world-class infrastructure and the presence of global majors.

data.title: Rio Tinto Announces Change in Substantial Holder Interests
data.description:
Rio Tinto Limited ( (AU:RIO) ) has shared an announcement.

Rio Tinto Limited has announced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, with State Street Global Advisors and its subsidiaries adjusting their voting power in the company. This change reflects a shift in the control over voting rights and securities management, which could impact Rio Tinto’s governance and decision-making processes.

data.title: InFocus Group Secures Shareholder Approval for Strategic Resolutions
data.description:
Frugl Group Limited ( (AU:IFG) ) has provided an announcement.

InFocus Group Holdings Limited announced the successful outcome of its Extraordinary General Meeting, where all proposed resolutions were approved by poll. This includes the ratification of share issues and the approval of options and shares to various parties, indicating strong shareholder support and potentially enhancing the company’s strategic positioning and operational capabilities.

More about Frugl Group Limited

InFocus Group Holdings Limited (IFG) is a data intelligence and software solutions company specializing in data analytics, software and platform development, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and machine learning. It operates through three business units: InFocus Analytics, the Frugl Grocery app, and Onify, with a fourth unit, Prodigy9, in the process of acquisition, providing enterprise-scale capabilities.

data.title: Shenyang Public Utility Holdings Announces Major Acquisition in Property Management Sector
data.description:
The latest update is out from Shenyang Public Utility Holdings Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:0747) ).

Shenyang Public Utility Holdings Co. Ltd. has announced a significant acquisition of a 51% equity interest in Guangzhou Zhudao Property Management Company Limited for RMB550,000. This acquisition, classified as a very substantial acquisition under Hong Kong’s Listing Rules, will result in the consolidation of the financial results of the target company and its subsidiary into Shenyang’s financial statements, pending shareholder approval at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting.

More about Shenyang Public Utility Holdings Co. Ltd. Class H

Shenyang Public Utility Holdings Co. Ltd. is a joint stock limited company incorporated in China, focusing on public utility services. The company operates in the property management industry, providing management services to various properties, with a market focus on expanding its portfolio through strategic acquisitions.
